In the 2026 Gaokao cycle, reputation evaluation is 'somewhat negative', involving 99 incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, school management response, etc., with dense negative public opinion; however, Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure, and application attention remains high. Provincial control line data is missing; Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, the only 985 university in the province, with a large enrollment scale in the province (over 1,000 in Physics Category), strong local candidate willingness to apply, and obvious regional preference.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical categories in Hubei Province from 2021 to 2025 were 4524, 16053, 6414, 2879, and 4125 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, the overall ranking dropped to 16053 due to the nursing major, which is an outlier; it rebounded to 6414 in 2023, further climbed to 2879 in 2024 (the highest point in recent years), and fell back to 4125 in 2025. Regarding enrollment plans, there were 140 students in 2021, 150 in 2022, 160 in 2023, a sharp reduction to 74 in 2024, and maintained at 74 in 2025. The plan for 2026 further reduces to 72 students, a decrease of 2 students (-2.7%) compared to 2025, which is a small reduction and has limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and is selected as one of the first batch of Double First-Class construction universities (Category A). As a comprehensive top-tier institution, its medical disciplines leverage the overall platform advantages of the university, enjoying extremely high reputation and influence in the Central China region. Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have long been favored by candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been continuously rising, especially long-track programs like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, a central city in Central China, with abundant medical resources and excellent internship and employment environments, making it highly attractive to candidates within Hubei Province. In 2026, medical categories only recruit students from the Physics subject group (first choice Physics, second choice Chemistry), narrowing the recruitment scope, but the overall scale of medical applications within the province remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and recent trend corrections, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical categories in 2026 is approximately 4138. From 2024 to 2025, rankings first decreased then increased. With a slight enrollment reduction in 2026 and continued medical popularity, the ranking is expected to rise slightly (harder to enter) compared to 2025, with a fluctuation range of 4263 to 4013. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably within this range.
